## nsc instance history

History of your previous running instances.

```
nsc instance history [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --all               If true, return all instances, not just manually created ones.
  -h, --help              help for history
      --max_entries int   Maximum number of instances to return. (default 100)
  -o, --output string     One of plain or json. (default "plain")
      --since duration    Contrain list to selected duration. (default 168h0m0s)
```

* [nsc instance](nsc_instance.md)	 - Instance-related activities.
